from __future__ import annotations


class Lock:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.held = False

    def acquire(self) -> None:
        self.held = True

    def release(self) -> None:
        self.held = False


def _task_a(lock: Lock) -> str:
    lock.acquire()
    try:
        return "a"
    finally:
        lock.release()


def repeated_try_finally_release_pattern_not_extracted_positive(lock: Lock) -> str:
    lock.acquire()
    try:
        return "b"
    finally:
        lock.release()
